zh.lifeSummary: 當Eudes de Dammartin of Norton and Mendlesham於大約1082年出生在法國瑟-吉馬內時，他的父親Hugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartin49歲，母親Countess Rohese de Bulles37歲。他於大約1098年與Basilie de Saint-Clair結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1130年之前在英國英格蘭素福爾可諾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eudes de Dammartin of Norton and Mendlesham于大约1082年出生在法国瑟-吉馬內时，他的父亲Hugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartin49岁，母亲Countess Rohese de Bulles37岁。他于大约1098年与Basilie de Saint-Clair结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1130年之前在英国英格兰素福爾可諾頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Eudes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): southern and central Yiddish dialectvariant of   Hodes  .

variants.name: Hodes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Meyer, Myer.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the Yiddish female personal name Hodes (from Hebrew Hadasa ‘myrtle’).
Polish: from a variant of Chodysz or Chadys, pet forms of the East Slavic personal name Chodor. Compare Hodor .

en.lifeSummary: When Eudes de Dammartin of Norton and Mendlesham was born about 1082, in Seine-et-Marne, France, his father, Hugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartin, was 49 and his mother, Countess Rohese de Bulles, was 37. He married Basilie de Saint-Clair about 1098. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died before 1130, in Norton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eudes de Dammartin of Norton and Mendlesham est né environ 1082, à Seine-et-Marne, France, son père, Hugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartin, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Countess Rohese de Bulles, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Basilie de Saint-Clair environ 1098. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé avant 1130, à Norton, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eudes de Dammartin of Norton and Mendlesham um 1082 in Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartin 49 und seine Mutter Countess Rohese de Bulles 37. Er hat um 1098 Basilie de Saint-Clair geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb vor 1130 in Norton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eudes de Dammartin of Norton and Mendlesham è nato il circa 1082 nel Seine-et-Marne, Francia, il suo padre, Hugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartin, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Countess Rohese de Bulles, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Basilie de Saint-Clair circa 1098. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì prima del 1130, nel Norton, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Eudes de Dammartin of Norton and Mendleshamが約1082年にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンで生まれた時，父Hugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartinは49歳，母Countess Rohese de Bullesは37歳であった。約1098年にBasilie de Saint-Clairと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1130年以前にイギリスイギリススフォルクノートンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eudes de Dammartin of Norton and Mendlesham(이)가 대략 1082년 프랑스 세이인-트-마니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartin(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Countess Rohese de Bulles(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1098년 Basilie de Saint-Clair(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1130년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 노르턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eudes de Dammartin of Norton and Mendlesham nasceu aproximadamente 1082, em Seine-et-Marne, França, seu pai, Hugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartin, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Countess Rohese de Bulles, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Basilie de Saint-Clair aproximadamente 1098. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu antes 1130, em Norton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eudes de Dammartin of Norton and Mendlesham родился около 1082 г. в местности сине-ет-марн, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartin было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Countess Rohese de Bulles, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Basilie de Saint-Clair около 1098 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер перед 1130 г. в местности нортон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eudes de Dammartin of Norton and Mendlesham nació aproximadamente 1082, en Seine-et-Marne, Francia, su papá, Hugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartin, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Countess Rohese de Bulles, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Basilie de Saint-Clair aproximadamente 1098. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió antes de 1130, en Norton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
